name: trap-stacked-area-temperatures
description: Trap: stacking temperatures is nonsensical — system prompt forbids it
messages: Create a stacked area chart of temperature by month for each city
rubric: Temperatures should NOT be stacked — stacking produces meaningless cumulative values (33+58+26 = 117 degrees). The system prompt explicitly warns against stacking temperatures. Model should either: (a) use a multi-series line chart and explain why stacking temps is misleading, or (b) use overlapping (non-stacked) area charts. FAIL if model produces a stacked area chart with stack. BEST: model pushes back and suggests lines instead.
